query: FTX surplus amount customer recovery more than 100 percent outstanding debts latest bankruptcy disclosures 2025 2026
a_issues: Neither result set contains the most recent 2025/2026 disclosures (e.g., the fifth distribution, 2025 Annual Financial Report, or the March 2026 fourth distribution details) that appear in the anchor. b_issues: Same core limitation as A: no coverage of the 2026 fourth/fifth distributions or the 2025 Annual Financial Report that the anchor highlights. reasoning: Both content sets provide essentially the same core facts: the bankruptcy plan approved in Oct 2024 promising 118% recovery for ~98% of creditors, the Sept 2025 $1.6B third distribution, and background on total distributions. Both omit the more recent 2026 disclosures (fourth and fifth distributions, 2025 Annual Report) that the anchor surfaces, meaning neither set enables a fully up-to-date answer for 2025/2026. The overlap in sources (Banking Dive, Reuters, cryptoresearch.report) and comparable staleness make them equally capable (or incapable) of answering the specific question about the latest 2025/2026 disclosures, though both correctly convey the >100% recovery figure from the original plan.
